title: Device Home Screen - Limited Support After Launch Date When LM Version Is Empty
scenario: Device Home Screen shows limited support and "Device support coming soon" pop-up when connected to a newly launched device with empty LM version info
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
2. Connect a newly released Poly Bluetooth audio device (whose LM version info is empty in the product catalogue) to the app.
3. Ensure the current date is past the device's official launch date.
4. Observe the Device Home Screen — verify that it shows limited support indicators.
5. Tap the "i" (info) icon on the Device Home Screen.
6. Observe the pop-up message that appears.
7. Tap outside the pop-up to dismiss it.
expected: The Device Home Screen shows limited support. Tapping the \"i\" icon displays a pop-up message: \"Device support coming soon. In-app functionality may be limited.\" Tapping outside the pop-up dismisses it.
